title: TaTe's Custom Armors and Elytras
description: New Armor Sets and Elytras using CIT!
body:
![New Armors and Elytras!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adc1f683e35601dda7515484762e895addca89df.png) 

# **IMPORTANT** - I (AverageTaTeMan) only share my content on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/averagetateman/), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/AverageTaTeMan), and [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/averagetateman/projects) - If you see this project on any other site, IT IS NOT ME AND SHOULD NOT BE TRUSTED!

## Optifine or Other CIT Mod Required!

This pack uses CIT to add textures for 40 armor sets and 20 elytras.  Additionally, you can make the worn model of any armor/elytra invisible to show off your skin.  To obtain these custom items, simply use an anvil to rename the appropriate item(s) to one of these names.  This information is also included as part of the pack in 'custom_items_guide.txt'

### Armors:
- Gilded Armor (Rename Golden Armor)
- Charged Copper Armor (Rename Copper Armor)
- Emerald Armor (Rename Dimond Armor)
- Bee Armor (Rename Copper Armor)
- Cactus Armor (Rename Chain Armor)
- Obsidian Armor (Rename Diamond Armor)
- Machine Armor (Rename Iron Armor)
- Guardian Armor (Rename Iron Armor)
- Shulker Armor (Rename Diamond Armor)
- Magma Armor (Rename Iron Armor)
- Dripstone Armor (Rename Chain Armor)
- Totem Armor (Rename Golden Armor)
- Redstone Armor (Rename Iron Armor) (Suggested By LukeyP_92 on PMC)
- Sculk Armor (Rename Diamond Armor) (Suggested By LukeyP_92 on PMC)
- Bone Armor (Rename Chain Armor) (Suggested By LukeyP_92 on PMC)
- Skeleton Armor (Rename Chain Armor)
- Wither Skeleton Armor (Rename Chain Armor)
- Glass Armor (Rename Chain Armor)
- Ender Dragon Armor (Rename Diamond Armor) (Suggested By Jujan on PMC)
- Red Dragon Armor (Rename Diamond Armor)
- Bedrock Armor (Rename Diamond Armor) (Suggested By Azev on PMC)
- Reinforced Deepslate Armor (Rename Diamond Armor) (Suggested By Azev on PMC)
- Galaxy Armor (Rename Diamond Armor) (Suggested by sgtbruce on PMC)
- Power Suit Armor (Rename Netherite Armor) (Suggested by sgtbruce on PMC)
- Lapis Armor (Rename Iron Armor)
- Quartz Armor (Rename Golden Armor)
- Amethyst Armor (Rename Iron Armor)
- Coal Armor (Rename Copper Armor)
- Ruby Armor (Rename Diamond Armor)
- Sniffer Armor (Rename Golden Armor)
- RGB Armor (Rename Netherite Armor)
- Music Armor (Rename Golden Armor)
- Pot Armor (Rename Golden Armor)
- Crafting Armor (Rename Diamond Armor)
- Ancient Debris Armor (Rename Netherite Armor)
- TNT Armor (Rename Iron Armor)
- Resin Armor (Rename Copper Armor)
- Armadillo Armor (Rename Golden Armor)
- Spawner Armor (Rename Iron Armor)
- Trial Armor (Rename Diamond Armor)
- Invisible Armor (Rename Any Armor, Only Affects Worn Model) (Suggested by .gemgenesis on Discord)

### Elytras:

- Target Elytra

- Wifi Elytra
- RGB Elytra

- Pumpkin Elytra

- Wind Elytra
